description.value: Aura moderate illusion; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 8,800 gp; Weight 3 lbs. DESCRIPTION This thin staff is made of stiff wood that has been wrapped in colorful bands of cloth and topped with a number of feathers, bells, and other decorative baubles. The staff allows use of the following spells: Ghost sound (1 charge) Mage hand (1 charge) Prestidigitation (1 charge) Silent image (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells ghost sound, mage hand, prestidigitation, silent image; Cost 4,400 gp.
